lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਕੁਟੰਬੁ ਨਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਮਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: naa tis kuttanb naa tis maataa |
lines.english: He has no family, and he has no mother.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਏਕੁ ਰਵਿਆ ਸਭ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਭਨਾ ਜੀਆ ਕਾ ਆਧਾਰੀ ਹੇ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: eko ek raviaa sabh antar sabhanaa jeea kaa aadhaaree he |13|
lines.english: The One and Only Lord is pervading and permeating deep within the nucleus of all. He is the Support of all beings. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਛਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh saachaa sabad pachhaataa |
lines.english: The Gurmukh realizes the True Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮੇਰਾ ਦੂਜਾ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: haumai meraa doojaa bhaaeaa |
lines.english: Egotism, possessiveness, and the love of duality

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਛੁ ਨ ਚਲੈ ਧੁਰਿ ਖਸਮਿ ਲਿਖਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kichh na chalai dhur khasam likh paaeaa |
lines.english: - none of these shall go along with you; such is the pre-ordained will of our Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤੂ ਦੇਹਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jaa too dehi sadaa sukh paae |
lines.english: If You so bless me, then I shall find lasting peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸਾਚੇ ਤੇ ਸਾਚੁ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ਸਾਚੈ ਦੂਖ ਨਿਵਾਰੀ ਹੇ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: gur saache te saach kamaaveh saachai dookh nivaaree he |14|
lines.english: Through the True Guru, practice Truth, and the True Lord shall take away your pains. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਵੇਖੈ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਚਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aape vekhai hukam chalaae |
lines.english: He Himself watches, and issues His Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਦਰੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਭਗਤਿ ਭਰੇ ਭੰਡਾਰੀ ਹੇ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: andar saachaa man tan saachaa bhagat bhare bhanddaaree he |15|
lines.english: The True Lord is within me, and my mind and body have become True. I am blessed with the overflowing treasure of devotional worship. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੈ ਸਬਦੇ ਸਾਚੁ ਕਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: saachai sabade saach kamaae |
lines.english: Through the True Word of the Shabad, I live the Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਣਾ ਭਾਣਾ ਆਪਿ ਕਰਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: apanaa bhaanaa aap karaae |
lines.english: He Himself inspires us to obey His Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਰਸਨਾ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਵਾਰੀ ਹੇ ॥੧੬॥੭॥
lines.translit: naanak naam rate bairaagee man tan rasanaa naam savaaree he |16|7|
lines.english: O Nanak, only those who are attuned to the Naam are detached; their minds, bodies and tongues are embellished with the Naam. ||16||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਵਰਤੈ ਏਕੁ ਪਰਛੰਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabh meh varatai ek parachhanaa |
lines.english: The One Lord is pervading in all, remaining hidden.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਆਪੁ ਉਪਾਇ ਉਪੰਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: aape aap upaae upanaa |
lines.english: He Himself created Himself, and came into being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਸਾਰ ਕਰੇ ਜਗਜੀਵਨੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਅਪਣਾ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa saar kare jagajeevan jin apanaa aap pachhaataa he |1|
lines.english: The Lord, the Life of the world, takes care of all. Whoever knows his own self, realizes God. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮਾ ਬਿਸਨੁ ਮਹੇਸੁ ਉਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jin brahamaa bisan mahes upaae |
lines.english: He who created Brahma, Vishnu and Shiva,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰਿ ਸਿਰਿ ਧੰਧੈ ਆਪੇ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sir sir dhandhai aape laae |
lines.english: links each and every being to its tasks.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲੇ ਜਿਨਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਏਕੋ ਜਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jis bhaavai tis aape mele jin guramukh eko jaataa he |2|
lines.english: He merges into Himself, whoever is pleasing to His Will. The Gurmukh knows the One Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਾ ਗਉਣੁ ਹੈ ਸੰਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: aavaa gaun hai sansaaraa |
lines.english: The world is coming and going in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਿਰੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਜਿਨਿ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਪਛਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: thir saachaa saalaahee sad hee jin gur kaa sabad pachhaataa he |3|
lines.english: One who realizes the Word of the Guru's Shabad, praises forever the eternal, unchanging True Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਬਹੁ ਚਿਤੈ ਬਿਕਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohu bahu chitai bikaaraa |
lines.english: Attached to Maya, it dwells on its many sins.

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਾਲੀ ਲਾਗੇ ਤਿਨੀ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: ddaalee laage tinee janam gavaaeaa |
lines.english: But those who are attached to the branches, waste their lives away uselessly.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਮੂਲਿ ਲਗੇ ਓਨੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: eik mool lage onee sukh paaeaa |
lines.english: Some are attached to the root - they find peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਫਲ ਤਿਨ ਜਨ ਕਉ ਲਾਗੇ ਜੋ ਬੋਲਹਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਬਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: amrit fal tin jan kau laage jo boleh amrit baataa he |4|
lines.english: Those humble beings, who chant the Name of the Ambrosial Lord, produce the ambrosial fruit. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਸਭਨਾ ਦੇਖਹਿ ਤੋਲਹਿ ਤੋਲ ॥
lines.translit: too sabhanaa dekheh toleh tol |
lines.english: You see all, and weigh them on Your scale.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਗੁਣ ਨਾਹੀ ਕਿਆ ਬੋਲਹ ਬੋਲ ॥
lines.translit: ham gun naahee kiaa bolah bol |
lines.english: I have no virtues; what words should I speak?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਣਾ ਤਾ ਸਚੀ ਕਾਰੈ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jaa tudh bhaanaa taa sachee kaarai laae |
lines.english: According to Your Will, You link me to my true tasks.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਉ ਰਾਖਹਿ ਰਹਣਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਏਕੋ ਜਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: jiau bhaavai tiau raakheh rahanaa guramukh eko jaataa he |5|
lines.english: By Your will, You preserve me, and so do I remain. The Gurmukh knows the One Lord. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਮਹਿ ਏਕੋ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਛਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: gun meh eko niramal saachaa gur kai sabad pachhaataa he |6|
lines.english: The One Immaculate True Lord abides in virtue; through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, He is realized. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਗਣ ਛੋਡਿ ਗੁਣ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: avagan chhodd gun maeh samaae |
lines.english: Renouncing vice, I am immersed in virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੀ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਸਬਦੇ ਖੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: doojee duramat sabade khoee |
lines.english: Duality and evil-mindedness are destroyed through the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਦੇਖਾ ਤਹ ਏਕੋ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jeh dekhaa teh eko soee |
lines.english: Wherever I look, there I see Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕਸੁ ਮਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਏਕੁ ਸਮਾਣਾ ਅਪਣੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਸਦ ਰਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: ekas meh prabh ek samaanaa apanai rang sad raataa he |7|
lines.english: The One Lord God is immersed in His Oneness. He is attuned forever to His own delight. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਕਮਲੁ ਹੈ ਕੁਮਲਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa kamal hai kumalaanaa |
lines.english: The body-lotus is withering away,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਬੁਝੈ ਇਆਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh sabad na bujhai eaanaa |
lines.english: but the ignorant, self-willed manmukh does not understand the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਕਾਇਆ ਖੋਜੇ ਪਾਏ ਜਗਜੀਵਨੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee kaaeaa khoje paae jagajeevan daataa he |8|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, he searches his body, and finds the Great Giver, the Life of the world. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਇਛੇ ਸੋਈ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਏ ਜਿਉ ਰੰਗੁ ਮਜੀਠੈ ਰਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: jo ichhe soee fal paae jiau rang majeetthai raataa he |9|
lines.english: The fruits of his desires are obtained, and he is dyed in the permanent color of the Lord's Love. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਰਾਖੈ ਉਰ ਧਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa har jeeo raakhai ur dhaare |
lines.english: when one keeps the Dear Lord enshrined forever in the heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟ ਗਹੀ ਕੇ ਪਾਪ ਨਿਵਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: kott gahee ke paap nivaare |
lines.english: The Lord frees up the body-fortress, which was seized by sins,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਕਥੇ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh giaan kathe na hoee |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh speaks of spiritual wisdom, but does not understand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਵੈ ਠਉਰ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: fir fir aavai tthaur na koee |
lines.english: Again and again, he comes into the world, but he finds no place of rest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਸਦਾ ਸਾਲਾਹੇ ਜੁਗਿ ਜੁਗਿ ਏਕੋ ਜਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: guramukh giaan sadaa saalaahe jug jug eko jaataa he |10|
lines.english: The Gurmukh is spiritually wise, and praises the Lord forever. Throughout each and every age, the Gurmukh knows the One Lord. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਕਾਰ ਕਰੇ ਸਭਿ ਦੁਖ ਸਬਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh kaar kare sabh dukh sabaae |
lines.english: All the deeds which the manmukh does bring pain - nothing but pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਕਿਉ ਦਰਿ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: antar sabad naahee kiau dar jaae |
lines.english: The Word of the Shabad is not within him; how can he go to the Court of the Lord?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਦ ਸੇਵੇ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: guramukh sabad vasai man saachaa sad seve sukhadaataa he |11|
lines.english: The True Shabad dwells deep within the mind of the Gurmukh; he serves the Giver of peace forever. ||11||
